testsuite.name: hexlet.code.controller.UrlControllerTest

org.h2.jdbc.JdbcSQLSyntaxErrorException: Столбец "URL_CHECKS.CREATED_AT" не найден Column "URL_CHECKS.CREATED_AT" not found; SQL statement: SELECT urls.id, urls.name, url_checks.status_code, url_checks.created_at FROM urls LEFT JOIN ( SELECT url_checks.id, url_checks.status_code, url_checks.h1, url_checks.title, url_checks.description, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY url_checks.url_id ORDER BY url_checks.created_at DESC) AS rn FROM url_checks ) AS url_checks ON urls.id = url_checks.url_id AND url_checks.rn = 1; [42122-232] at
